_doc: Journey into Nyx (JOU) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/jou.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 60C / 60U / 35R / 10M. Collation: sequential. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set. US printing sequential collation. 36 packs per box. Rare 'god pack' exists containing all 15 god cards from the Theros block instead of the usual contents (plus an ad card). Basic land from Theros.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
